_comment: Good Enough Garage Doors — source of truth for the static site generator (_build/build.mjs). Keep DISTINCT from sibling fleet sites. See _shared/playbooks/SITE-REQUIREMENTS.md.
hoursDisplay: 7 days a week, 7am–9pm. After-hours? We text you back.
voice: humble over-deliverer — under-promise, over-deliver, value-forward; 'Good enough' is an understatement

design.motionPersonality: warm + measured — soft slower reveals, gentle stagger, a calm parallax; nothing flashy (matches the humble voice)

imagery.styleBlock: photorealistic documentary photography, shot on 35mm, natural Pacific-Northwest daylight, soft bright overcast, realistic skin texture and worn materials, candid, true-to-life ordinary working people, slight film grain, no studio lighting, no retouching, no glamour
imagery.brandBlock: the crew wears deep plum-purple work jackets with a small warm-sand chest logo and plum ball caps; the service van is a recent Ford Transit cleanly wrapped in deep plum purple with a warm sand/gold stripe, brand name 'GOOD ENOUGH GARAGE DOORS' on the side and 'info@goodenoughgaragedoors.ca' below it, BC licence plate; brand colours are plum purple (#6b3fa0) and warm sand gold (#e0a82e)
imagery.rules: real average blue-collar Metro-Vancouver people (not models), Lower-Mainland homes & streets, EMAIL on the wrap only — NEVER a phone number, minimal wrap text

tiers.label: Single spring replacement
tiers.sub: One broken torsion spring, replaced with a new pro-grade spring.

tiers.label: Two springs + new cables
tiers.sub: Both springs replaced in a balanced pair — the honest fix that lasts.

tiers.label: Two high-cycle springs
tiers.sub: Premium longer-life springs (roughly double the cycles) for busy doors.

freeWithEveryJob: Free safety inspection on every spring job

openerPricing._note: Value-forward, installed prices. Distinct from sibling sites.

partnerProgram.headline: We get more calls than we can take. Let's share the overflow.

trust.ratingNote: We send a Google review request after every job — and reply to every review.
trust.yearsNote: Locally owned. Canadian-owned. Real people who answer the phone.
